Warrant - Bench Warrant Return 03/23/2022 FTA HEARING, 3rd Bench Warrant
PLFT NON OPP TO MOTION TO VACATE FORF AND EXON BAIL BOND FILED
RPII MOT TO VACATE FORF & EXON BOND 1305(C)(3) PC FILED
/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/INTC/BWDNC/ORNAS/X:DEFENDANT IS RELEASED FORPURPOSES OF CLEARING ALAMEDA ENROUTE/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND CUSTODY STATUS/DOP/

/CAL:PROC RE $1,000 BW STAYED FROM 09-03-21/INTC/BWSTAY:09-03-21/STWPX//CTORD:STAY AWAY ORDER ISSUED ON 08-13-21 IS HEREBY TERMINATED/  /SATERM/X:NEW STAY AWAY ORDER ISSUED/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO STAY 150 YARDS AWAY FROM TURK AND LARKIN STREETS WITH THE EXCEPTION OF ENTERING  THE PROHIBITED AREA TOATTEND COLLABORATIVE COURT, MEET WITH YOUR CASE MANAGER, COMPLY WITH TREATMENT PLAN AND ACCESS SERVICES AS DIRECTED/DEF:IS HEREBY ORDERED TO STAY OUT OF THE FOLLOWING LOCATIONS: EXCEPT AS SPECIFIED ABOVE, AREA BORDERED BY TURK, LARKIN, MCALLISTER AND HYDE  STREETS AND 150 YARDS BEYOND, DO NOT LOITER IN AREA BORDERED BY GOLDEN GATE AVE,VANNESS AVE, EDDY AND TAYLOR STREETS

/CAL:PRE PLEA PRG RPT/CONTD: PROC RE $1,000 BW STAYED FROM 09-03-21/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCHWARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO09-10-21/X: BAIL SET AT $1,000/DOPC/

/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/CONTD:COMMUNITY JUSTICE COURT/DOP/EMTERM/INTC/LD:09-27-21/SA2:THE 600 BLOCK OF EDDY ST,, SF/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT TO NOTLOITER IN THE AREA BOUNDED BY VAN NESS AVE,, EDDY ST,, TAYLOR ST,, AND GOLDEN GATE AVE,, SF/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/X: PAULINA SANTANA APPEARS WITH KATHLEEN NATIVIDADFROM THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE/987,2/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OFALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX: 09-27-21 (60TH)/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/CTORD: AS A CONDITION OF THE ELECTRONIC MONITORING, THE DEFENDANT MUST STAY AWAY 150 YARDS FROM TURK AND LARKIN, MCALLISTAR AND HYDE AS WELL AS 600 EDDY STREET/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: GLOBAL DISPOSITION/DOP/
/CAL ACM ELIG REPORT/FTA/BF/BWI/SURETY/BFORF HEARING/BFORF2 5,000/BAIL 15,000/BWNUM:3RD/X: 2 OF 3 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:5,000/BWNUM:2ND/X: 2ND OF3 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/
/CAL:TO JOIN 21009530/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:15,000/BWNUM:1ST/X:2 OF 2 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/
/CAL:CJC PRG RPT AND PTC/X:CASE HEARD BEFORE JUDGE SING APPEARING VIA ZOOM/CONT/DOPC/DAWT/
